title: CI: fix runner disk exhaustion on cargo cache restore
description: The check job cached the full target/ dir via actions/cache@v4; with DuckDB's bundled C++ build the cache grew to ~4.6GB and tar ran the runner out of disk on restore (Wrote only N of M bytes), failing every branch. Switch to Swatinem/rust-cache@v2 (prunes target before save) and add an inline free-disk-space step.

title: Consolidate AI providers into shared module + extract generic HTTP retry
description: Five adapters (embed/voyage, embed/openai, embed/ollama, summarize/anthropic, store/turbopuffer) each reimplement the same reqwest+exponential-backoff retry loop. Extract a generic src/http/ module (RetryPolicy + send_with_retry) used by both AI adapters and the store, and consolidate the four AI provider adapters into a new src/ai_providers/ module with a capability registry (Embed/Summarize). Voyage stays embed-only. Embedder/Summarizer traits remain in embed/ and summarize/; factories dispatch into ai_providers and gate on capability.
close_reason: Implemented: extracted src/http (RetryPolicy + send_with_retry), consolidated adapters into src/ai_providers with capability registry, migrated turbopuffer onto shared retry. All gates green.
